title: Kayock Writer Chapter Planner Preview
message: Chapter Planner Preview: CHAPTER PLANNER PREVIEW READY

summary.book_summary: Anthony hunts the ex, learns who she has become, defeats her, discovers Jokaya sanctuary clues, follows Olmec/Croatoan/Crystal Skull threads.

selected_book.title: Book 2
selected_book.summary: Anthony hunts the ex, learns who she has become, defeats her, discovers Jokaya sanctuary clues, follows Olmec/Croatoan/Crystal Skull threads.

chapter_templates.title: Chapter 1 — The Hunt Begins
chapter_templates.goal: Launch Anthony’s hunt for his turned ex.
chapter_templates.conflict: Anthony wants answers, but every clue suggests she is no longer the person he remembers.
chapter_templates.reveal: Her transformation has a pattern and a purpose.
chapter_templates.hook: End with a trace pointing to Jokaya’s sanctuary.
continuity_notes: Book 2 starts after Anthony learns his ex has been turned.

chapter_templates.title: Chapter 2 — Sanctuary Clues
chapter_templates.goal: Reveal the first credible path toward Jokaya’s sanctuary.
chapter_templates.conflict: The clues are old, deliberately hidden, and possibly bait.
chapter_templates.reveal: The sanctuary connects to Olmec/Croatoan/Crystal Skull threads.
chapter_templates.hook: End with a physical artifact or mural clue.
continuity_notes: Tie sanctuary evidence to Book 2 outline.

chapter_templates.title: Chapter 3 — The Skull Trail
chapter_templates.goal: Deepen the Crystal Skull and Croatoan mystery.
chapter_templates.conflict: Evidence points in impossible directions and challenges the known vampire history.
chapter_templates.reveal: The skulls are linked to many vampires, not a single relic.
chapter_templates.hook: End with proof that Croatoan escaped or was released.
chapter_templates.location: TBD / archive, ruin, or hidden chamber
continuity_notes: Use Crystal Skulls as multi-vampire prison clue.
Keep Baal Pueblo tunnels removed unless later restored.

checks.message: Project health card state is clear.
All future chapter writes are disabled in preview mode.
No chapter/story files were created, moved, renamed, overwritten, or deleted.

recommendations.title: Mark Chapter Planner Preview proven
recommendations.recommendation: Use this as the safe no-write chapter planning foundation before adding chapter save actions.

recommendations.title: Build Chapter Save Approval Gate next
recommendations.recommendation: Add a no-write approval gate that checks target chapter filenames, overwrite risk, and approval phrase before any chapter cards can be saved.

recommendations.title: Poetry Studio can follow
recommendations.recommendation: After Chapter Planner has a safe save gate, begin Poetry Studio foundation cards.
